---
title: "\'The Tramp of Many Feet\'"
---

## \'The Tramp of Many Feet\'

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith

### Notes

This story, whose heroines were named Dorothea and Dulcibella, was serialized in the <i>Churchman\'s Companion</i> 1883-4, but does not appear to have been published in volume form.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
